visual_description: A man in a white shirt and dark pants walks away from the camera down a dimly lit hallway with metal railings and industrial-style walls. He carries a bag in his left hand and his gaze is directed forward, his posture upright as he moves steadily. The scene is indoors, with sparse lighting and visible pipes and structural elements in the background.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a neutral tone, speaking at a moderate pace with no noticeable inflection.
